---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or product improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve.

## Proposal

Describe the capability you want.

## Why This Fits

- how it improves retrieval, provenance, policy, or usability
- why it belongs in `memd` rather than another system

## Scope

- version / roadmap area:
- expected branch type:
- likely docs impact:

## Acceptance

- [ ] clear user-visible outcome
- [ ] testable behavior
- [ ] docs and API impact understood
